name: EOA – Welcome Email Sequence
description: Triggered by the RSVP Intake workflow for auto-approved leads. Sends a 3-touch email sequence: Day 0 approval email, Day 1 invite links (WhatsApp + Telegram + niche subgroups), Day 7 feedback + referral prompt.

nodes.name: Welcome Sequence Webhook
nodes.notes: Called by rsvp-intake.json. Set this URL as N8N_WELCOME_SEQUENCE_URL. Expects: name, email, whatsapp, businessNiche, website, socials, matchedSubgroups, approvedAt.

parameters.subject: =You're in! Welcome to EOA Chiang Mai 🎉
parameters.message:
=

You're approved for Chiang Mai Founders! 🎉

Hi {{$json.name}},

Welcome to Entrepreneurs of Asia – Chiang Mai. You've been approved as a community member.

What to expect

  • Weekly events every Thursday at 6 PM — curated founder meetups with speakers, lightning talks, and networking
  • Private venues revealed to approved members only (check your invite email Day 1)
  • WhatsApp community — direct access to 100+ founders and nomads based in Chiang Mai
  • Telegram channel for announcements, event updates, and community news

Tomorrow you'll receive your invite links for our WhatsApp and Telegram groups.

Keep an eye on your inbox!

See you Thursday,
The EOA Team
eoa.cm

parameters.subject: =Your EOA invite links — WhatsApp & Telegram
parameters.message:
=

Your community invite links

Hi {{$json.name}},

Here are your links to join the EOA Chiang Mai community groups:

WhatsApp Community

Join EOA WhatsApp Community

Telegram Channel & Group

  • EOA Chiang Mai Chat (Telegram) — member discussions
  • @EOAChiangMai — event announcements channel
{{$json.subgroupHtml}}

Next Event

Our next event is this Thursday at 6 PM. Check eoa.cm for the venue (revealed to approved members).

See you soon,
The EOA Team
eoa.cm

nodes.name: Wait 6 More Days
nodes.notes: Total elapsed: 7 days from approval (1 day + 6 days).

parameters.subject: =Quick check-in from the EOA team 🙏
parameters.message:
=

How are you settling in?

Hi {{$json.name}},

It's been a week since you joined EOA Chiang Mai. We'd love to hear from you.

Quick feedback (2 questions)

  1. Have you attended an EOA event yet? If so, what was your highlight?
  2. What would make EOA more valuable for you?

Share your feedback →

Know a great founder?

EOA stays valuable because of the calibre of our members. If you know a founder or entrepreneur in Chiang Mai who'd benefit from the community — or is heading here soon — send them your personal invite:

https://eoa.cm/rsvp

The more builders we bring together, the better the conversations.

Thanks for being part of it,
The EOA Team
eoa.cm

notes: Set webhook path to 'eoa-welcome-sequence'. The webhook URL becomes N8N_WELCOME_SEQUENCE_URL in rsvp-intake.json. Requires SMTP credential named 'EOA SMTP' configured in N8N credentials. TELEGRAM_GROUP_INVITE_LINK must be set once the Telegram group is created (pending ENT-14).
